parsedJson.summary: Pro Master's site has a visible phone number and price anchor but a blocking cookie modal hides all persuasive content above the fold, there is no CTA button, and the composite photo-logo design reads as mid-2010s trade-site template.

issues.title: Cookie consent modal covers hero and body copy
issues.what_observed: On both desktop and mobile, a large white cookie consent dialog ('This website uses cookies. We use cookies to analyze website traffic…') with Decline/Accept buttons sits directly over the page content, obscuring the hero headline 'Your Local Roofing Contractor for Roof Restor…' and everything below it.
issues.why_problem: A visitor who clicks the business from Google Maps lands and immediately sees a wall of legalese instead of a reason to call. Most people either dismiss it without reading (costing the analytics data) or bounce before they see a single selling point. The business's value proposition is invisible until the visitor takes an action that has nothing to do with hiring a roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A slim 60px-tall bar pinned to the bottom of the screen with a single line of small text ('We use cookies') and an Accept button — it never covers any page content and visitors barely notice it.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the full-blocking modal with a bottom-pinned GDPR notice bar (max-height: 60px, z-index below sticky header). Ensure zero overlap with the hero section on all viewport sizes.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站一打开就弹出一个大弹窗（关于Cookie隐私协议），把整个页面的内容都挡住了，访客什么都看不到。
issues.customer_impact: 研究表明，网站访客平均在8秒内决定留还是走。弹窗让人看不到你提供什么服务，大多数人会直接关掉页面、换下一家，你的电话就少了一个机会。

issues.title: No quote or call CTA button visible anywhere above fold
issues.what_observed: The phone number '0423638119' appears as plain text at the top of both screenshots, but there is no button — no 'Get a Free Quote', no 'Call Now', no clickable affordance — visible above the fold on either device.
issues.why_problem: A plain phone number requires a visitor to copy it, open their dialer, and dial manually. On mobile, a tappable 'Call Now' button removes that friction entirely. Without a button, many ready-to-act visitors do nothing because there is no obvious next step presented to them.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-contrast CTA button (e.g. orange fill, white bold text, 48px+ height on mobile) reading 'Call Now: 0423638119' or 'Get a Free Quote' placed inside or directly below the hero, visible without any scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a primary CTA button inside the hero section using a tel: href link. On mobile, make it full-width and at least 48px tall. On desktop, place it beside or below the hero headline. Use the brand orange for fill with white text.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上虽然有电话号码，但它只是一串普通文字，没有可以直接点击拨打的按钮，手机用户需要手动复制号码才能打电话，很多人嫌麻烦就不打了。
issues.customer_impact: 移动端用户中，有可点击拨号按钮的页面比纯文字号码的页面电话转化率高出约40%。每10个看到页面的潜在客户，有4个可能因为没有按钮而直接离开。

issues.title: Logo is a composite photo-text graphic, not a real logo
issues.what_observed: The 'PRO MASTER' branding is rendered as text overlaid on a photo of roof tiles, with an orange triangle/chevron badge and a dark banner strip reading 'Roof Restorations & Exterior Painting' — the whole thing is one flat image file used as the hero.
issues.why_problem: This style of photo-composite logo was common on template trade sites around 2012–2015. A customer comparing three roofers subconsciously uses visual quality as a proxy for work quality. A DIY-looking logo signals a less established, less professional operation — especially to someone about to spend $3,500–$15,000 on their roof.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean vector logo (wordmark or icon + wordmark) displayed in the header on a solid background, completely separate from hero photography. Maximum two colors. Scales crisply at any size.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Commission a vector logo (SVG) and place it in the header nav bar. Use the hero slot for a full-bleed before/after roof photo with a text headline overlaid — not the logo. Remove the composite image entirely.
issues.plain_explanation: 现在的'Logo'其实是一张把文字和屋顶照片拼在一起的图片，看起来像是自己在电脑上随便做的，不像一家专业公司的形象。
issues.customer_impact: 消费者在选择本地服务商时，第一眼的专业感直接影响决策。如果网站看起来业余，约70%的访客会觉得这家公司可能服务质量也一般，转而选择看起来更专业的竞争对手。

issues.title: Hero section carries zero value proposition — just the logo
issues.what_observed: The entire hero area is occupied by the composite logo graphic (PRO MASTER on roof tiles). There is no headline, no supporting sentence, no reason for a visitor to choose this company over the four other roofers they have open in tabs.
issues.why_problem: Someone who just searched 'roofing Gold Coast' has already seen company names on the map — they need to know WHY this business. A logo answers nothing. The hero is the highest-value real estate on the page and it is being wasted on a brand repeat.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A full-width hero with a background roof photo, a bold white headline ('Gold Coast's Trusted Roof Restoration Specialists Since 2010'), a one-line supporting statement, and a primary CTA button — all visible without scrolling on any device.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the composite logo hero with: (1) a full-bleed before/after or finished-roof photo as background, (2) an H1 headline with the primary keyword and differentiation, (3) a 1-sentence trust statement, (4) CTA button. Move the logo to the header navbar.
issues.plain_explanation: 整个网站首屏最重要的位置，只放了一个Logo图片，没有告诉访客'我们提供什么服务''为什么选我们''我们的优势是什么'。
issues.customer_impact: 访客平均只花3–5秒看首屏。如果这几秒钟里只看到一个Logo，他们就不知道这家公司能解决什么问题，会立刻跳到下一个搜索结果。这意味着你的广告费和流量白白浪费。

issues.title: Hamburger menu used on desktop — navigation is hidden
issues.what_observed: On the desktop screenshot, only a small '≡' hamburger icon is visible in the top-left of the content area. No navigation links (Services, Gallery, Contact, About) are expanded or visible.
issues.why_problem: Desktop visitors expect a horizontal navigation bar. A hamburger on desktop is a recognised dark pattern that reduces site credibility and makes it harder to find key pages (services list, contact page, gallery). Visitors who can't find services pages quickly assume the site is incomplete or the business only does one thing.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A horizontal sticky navbar on viewports wider than 768px with 4–6 plainly labeled links: Services, Roof Restoration, Roof Painting, Gallery, Reviews, Contact — all visible without any click.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Apply a CSS breakpoint so the hamburger only appears below 768px. On desktop, render a full horizontal nav with text links. Make the nav sticky so it remains visible as visitors scroll.
issues.plain_explanation: 在电脑上打开网站，看不到任何导航菜单，只有一个小小的'三条横线'图标，访客根本不知道网站里有哪些内容、怎么找到报价或联系页面。
issues.customer_impact: 导航不清晰的网站，访客的跳出率比有清晰菜单的网站高出20–30%。访客找不到'联系我们'或'服务介绍'页面，就直接离开了，你就少了一个询价机会。

issues.title: No reviews, stars, or testimonials visible anywhere above fold
issues.what_observed: Neither the desktop nor mobile screenshot shows any star rating, Google review count, testimonial quote, or trust badge (beyond TrustedSite) in the above-fold area. The TrustedSite badge is visible in the bottom corner of the desktop view but is small and unfamiliar to most Australian consumers.
issues.why_problem: For local service businesses, reviews are the single biggest conversion driver. A customer comparing roofers on Google will immediately scan for social proof. A site with no visible stars or review count looks unvetted — even if the business has 50+ great Google reviews, hiding them wastes that trust entirely.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A social proof strip directly below the hero: '⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.9 stars · 63 Google Reviews' with two short 1-sentence customer quotes and first names. On mobile, this appears as a horizontal scrollable row of review cards.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a review strip component immediately below the hero section. Pull the star rating and count from Google Business Profile. Include 2–3 hardcoded recent quotes. Link the strip to the full Google Reviews page. Use gold star icons (#F5A623 or similar).
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏完全看不到任何客户好评或星级评分。访客不知道有没有人用过你的服务，对你是否可信心存疑虑。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务行业中，超过88%的消费者在决定联系商家前会先查看评价。如果网站上完全看不到评价，即使你在Google上有很高的评分，这些信任感也等于白白浪费了，访客会直接选显示评价的竞争对手。

issues.title: Pricing anchor bar text is too small to register
issues.what_observed: The top bar reads 'Roofs Painted from $3500' in what appears to be approximately 11–12px text in a thin dark strip. On mobile, it is slightly larger but still presented without any visual emphasis.
issues.why_problem: Price transparency is a genuine differentiator for local roofing searches — most competitors hide pricing. But if the text is too small or low-contrast, visitors skip past it without consciously registering the value. The competitive advantage is invisible.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A 14–16px bold announcement bar, high-contrast (white text on brand colour), with a subtle icon or arrow to draw attention. e.g. '🏠 Roofs Painted from $3,500 — Free Quote Today'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Increase the announcement bar to min 14px font, bold weight, white-on-brand-color background. Optionally incorporate the price anchor into the hero headline instead for even more impact.
issues.plain_explanation: 网页顶部有'屋顶喷漆起价$3500'的文字，但字体太小，访客很容易忽略这个对他们很有吸引力的价格信息。
issues.customer_impact: 明确的起步价格能让犹豫中的访客放心联系询价，这类价格锚点通常可以将询盘率提升15–25%。现在字太小没人注意到，等于这个优势完全没发挥作用。

positive_observations: Phone number '0423638119' is displayed prominently at the top of both desktop and mobile — this is the right instinct and should be preserved in the redesign as a sticky header element.
'Roofs Painted from $3500' price anchor is present — price transparency in roofing is rare and a genuine differentiator worth amplifying in the redesign.
TrustedSite badge indicates the site has SSL and some baseline security verification — the underlying credential is worth keeping and displaying more prominently.
redesign_priorities: 1. Kill the blocking cookie modal — replace with a bottom-pinned slim bar so visitors can see the page on arrival.
2. Build a real hero section — full-bleed roof photo, bold headline with value proposition, and a tappable 'Call Now' CTA button visible without any scrolling on mobile.
3. Add a social proof strip below the hero — Google star rating, review count, and 2–3 short customer quotes to convert fence-sitters before they open a competitor's tab.
